response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning closely with the role's stack. His background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, with measurable impact in high-throughput environments. His open-source contributions and leadership in technical workshops further highlight his expertise and collaborative mindset.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven experience in AI-agent development and scalable systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership
concerns: Limited exposure to Kotlin/Java (secondary stack requirement)
Some roles involved niche languages (e.g., DLang) not directly relevant
No explicit mention of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) in recent roles
